title: AUTH Message
description: RCAN message type 4. Establishes an authenticated session between a principal and a robot. The robot or registry validates the credentials and returns a session_token used in subsequent COMMAND messages.

message_type.description: Identifies this as an AUTH message.

role_level.description: Role level being claimed. The robot/registry MUST validate this against the principal's authorised roles.

session_token.description: Opaque bearer token issued by the registry or robot for this session.

expires_at_ms.description: Unix epoch time in milliseconds when this session token expires.

timestamp_ms.description: Unix epoch time in milliseconds when the AUTH message was created.
